title: oncidium × charlesworthii
intro: Oncidium × charlesworthii, also known as the Charlesworth's Oncidium, is a hybrid orchid species derived from the cross between Oncidium flexuosum and Oncidium varicosum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oncidium × charlesworthii include its potential to treat bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and may be used in traditional medicine to treat various health ailments.
